message:
test(widgets): Add 20 edge-case tests for Paginator widget, close bd-6e9.4

Cover all display modes (Compact, Page, Dots), edge cases (0/1/large page counts,
zero width, clamping), custom dot symbols, rendering integration, and builder API.
25 tests total (was 5).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
